title: VimFu — Ctrl-W F Split File at Line
description: Ctrl-W F splits the window and opens the file under the cursor, jumping to the line number that follows.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
ERROR in app.py:4
Traceback:
  File app.py line 4
  connect() failed

steps.say: Control W capital F opens the file under the cursor in a split and jumps to the line number next to it. Equivalent to colon sp plus four space app dot py.
An error log. Line one says app dot py colon four. Put the cursor on the filename.
Cursor on app dot py. We'll split and open it at line four.
Opened app dot py at line four in a split. The connect function that caused the error. Error log still visible. Control W capital F is the keystroke shortcut that does both.
Control W capital F. Open a file at a specific line from an error log or stack trace. Debug faster.
